text: Hey, quick question - does the app have any special offers right now?

The app crashes every time I try to log in. Any fix for this?
I'm encountering an issue with the software installation, it keeps failing. Also, I have a dog that seems to be very interested in my laptop. Can you help me troubleshoot this problem?
Can't connect to the app. It just crashes every time I try to log in.
Hey, my app crashes. Like, every time I try to open it. I’ve deleted and reinstalled, but, um, it’s still not working. Also, the notifications? They don’t show up sometimes. Super annoying!

I recently made a purchase but then cancelled it after seeing I'd been charged again. Can I get a refund for the last charge? It was a mistake on my part, but I'm now really confused about how this happened. I thought I had it all sorted out, but it's been a bit of a mess, honestly. Just need some clarity and my funds back, please!
My app crashes when I try to upload photos, and I have a meeting in 10 minutes!
I received a notification saying my account was suspended due to suspicious activity, yet I have made no recent changes. Can you clarify this situation?

I ordered a pair of shoes last month, but the wrong size was sent. I mean, it's just crazy because I even triple-checked my order before confirming! And now I see that the return policy is really confusing. Can I get a refund instead of a size exchange? This whole process has been so drawn out and tedious, it's like, can someone just help me? What's the deal with getting my money back? I just want to move on!
My app keeps crashing every time I try to log in. Any idea what's going on?
Hey, I ordered a phone case and a charger but only got the case. Can you tell me what happened? It’s kinda annoying.
I recently ordered a set of headphones and received only the charging cable. Could yyou please assist me with a refund for the missing item?

I've been trying to open the app for quite some time now, and every time I do, it crashes right after I tap the icon. I have an Android device, and I've cleared the cache and even reinstalled it multiple times without any success. It's becoming quite a hassle, and I really need to access my account as soon as possible. Can someone help me figure out what's going on?

I was trying to log in to my account after a long break, and it's saying that my account doesn't exist anymore? But I swear I had it just a few months back. I even received confirmation emails before about my subscriptions. What's going on? Do I need to create a new account or is there something else happening here? It's all very confusing.
I updated my email but I still get the verification links sent to my old one? Can someone fix this?
